raw_meta_yaml:
context:
    version: 0.7.0
    python_min: 3.12

package:
    name: bhklab-project-template
    version: ${{ version }}

source:
    - url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/b/bhklab-project-template/bhklab_project_template-${{ version }}.tar.gz
      sha256: 22f6fa0ee17f21b9104d905215b3135d4a38a6d840a207b7998d3ac46666c25c

build:
    script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install .
    python:
        entry_points:
            - bhklab-project-template = bhklab_project_template.__init__:cli
    noarch: python
    number: 0

requirements:
    host:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - hatchling
        - pip
    run:
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
        - click <9,>=8.2.0
        - copier <10,>=9.7.1
        - "rich-click "
        - rich <15,>=14.0.0

tests:
    - python:
          python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
          imports:
              - bhklab_project_template
          pip_check: true

about:
    summary: A simple CLI tool to create new BHKLab projects from a template
    license: MIT
    license_file: LICENSE.md
    homepage: https://github.com/bhklab/bhklab-project-template
extra:
    recipe-maintainers:
        - jjjermiah
